JUDGE: LORETTA M. NORRIS; REPORTER: LEE BATARA; CLERK; GARTH SAYERS. DEFAULT PROVE-UP ON CROSS-COMPLAINT. CROSS- COMPLAINANT ROBERTO SCHERILLO PRESENT WITH CHRISTOSTOMO IBARRA, ESQ.
